_comment: Builds core/engine-qvac.ts (the @qvac/sdk-backed engine) into core/dist with clean .js import specifiers, so the RN app can import core/dist/engine-qvac.js without Metro hitting .ts specifiers. SEPARATE from build:core/prepare on purpose: it imports @qvac/sdk, which is NOT installed in CI — run it (npm run build:engine) only where @qvac is present (app/anchor machine after npm install, or WSL).
